paragraphs.text: 这是第1篇初级阅读文章。今天我们要学习一些新的词语和句子。
paragraphs.translation: This is elementary reading article number 1. Today we'll learn some new words and sentences.

paragraphs.text: 多读书可以让我们学到很多知识。你喜欢读书吗？
paragraphs.translation: Reading more books helps us learn a lot of knowledge. Do you like reading?

paragraphs.text: 每天读一点，进步就会很大。加油！
paragraphs.translation: Read a little every day, and you will make great progress. Keep it up!
